name: koishi-plugin-chatluna-relay
description: Let a ChatLuna character bot proactively DM a whitelisted friend (optionally with an album photo) via a [[relay:...]] reply-marker it writes in its own output — guarded by trigger / recipient / friend-only / rate-limit / anti-loop checks.
author: 妖祀

description.zh: 让 ChatLuna 角色 bot 通过它在自己输出里写的 [[relay:别名|话|图=描述]] 标记，主动私信白名单好友（可附带相册照片）。标记从可见回复里剥除、带外执行，不进原生工具调用（避免角色解析被打断）。护栏：触发权白名单 / 收件人白名单 / 仅好友 / 限流 / 可选防回环。配图转发需存在提供 recallEntry 的 photo 服务（可选）。所有面向模型的话术均可在控制台/预设改写，适配任意角色。
description.en: Lets a ChatLuna character bot proactively DM a whitelisted friend (optionally with an album photo) via a [[relay:alias|text|图=desc]] marker it writes in its own output. The marker is stripped from the visible reply and executed out-of-band — no native tool call (so it never breaks the character parse). Guards: trigger whitelist / recipient whitelist / friend-only / rate-limit / optional anti-loop. Photo forwarding requires an optional 'photo' service exposing recallEntry. All model-facing wording is editable for any character.
